_README: Worked example from `04 - Formalizing with N-Squared Charts.md`. Filled-in reference for how to use n2-chart-template.json. Generates ecommerce-n2-chart.xlsx.

project.name: E-Commerce Platform — N2 Interface Chart (Worked Example)

subsystems.name: Storefront
subsystems.description: Customer-facing web UI for browsing and checkout.

subsystems.name: Payment
subsystems.description: Charges and refunds via payment processor.

subsystems.name: Notification
subsystems.description: Sends customer email/SMS for order events.

interfaces.name: Checkout Req
interfaces.data: Initiate checkout: cart_id, shipping address, payment method id.

interfaces.name: Search Results
interfaces.data: Ranked product list with facets and total count.

interfaces.name: Cart State
interfaces.data: Current cart items, totals, applied promotions.

interfaces.name: Cart Data
interfaces.data: Frozen cart snapshot returned in response to Cart Retrieval.

interfaces.name: Cart Retrieval
interfaces.data: GET /cart/:id — request cart snapshot for checkout.

interfaces.name: Delivery Status
interfaces.data: Webhook from email/SMS provider: delivered, bounced, opened.

system_flows.name: Checkout Pipeline
system_flows.description: Customer adds to cart, initiates checkout, order charges payment.

system_flows.name: Order Fulfillment Notification
system_flows.description: Order publishes events to notification for customer email/SMS.

control_loops.name: Order ↔ Payment Authorization Loop
control_loops.description: Order issues Payment Req; Payment returns Payment Result; Order finalizes state. A short, high-stakes loop — failure here blocks every checkout.

control_loops.name: Order ↔ Notification Delivery Loop
control_loops.description: Order publishes events; Notification reports delivery webhook back. Lets Order surface delivery failures to customers.

control_loops.name: Order ↔ Cart Retrieval Loop
control_loops.description: Order asks Cart for snapshot; Cart returns frozen cart data. Ensures checkout uses an immutable cart view.
